mapper.sql: id, title, description, price, original_price, images, category_id, seller_id, stock, quality, trade_type, trade_location, status, view_count, favorite_count, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_goods WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_goods (id, title, description, price, original_price, images, category_id, seller_id, stock, quality, trade_type, trade_location, status, view_count, favorite_count, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{images}, #{categoryId}, #{sellerId}, #{stock}, #{quality}, #{tradeType}, #{tradeLocation}, #{status}, #{viewCount}, #{favoriteCount}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_goods
title = #{title}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, original_price = #{originalPrice}, images = #{images}, category_id = #{categoryId}, stock = #{stock}, quality = #{quality}, trade_type = #{tradeType}, trade_location = #{tradeLocation}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_goods SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_goods SET stock = stock - #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{goodsId} AND stock >= #{quantity} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_goods SET stock = stock + #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{goodsId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_goods SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_goods SET favorite_count = favorite_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{goodsId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_goods SET favorite_count = GREATEST(favorite_count - 1, 0), update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{goodsId} AND deleted = 0
